summary: Quote Estimation API, Margin Simulator, and Promotions CRUD testing complete. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Settings Hub Pricing Policy tab with Margin Simulator, Promotions Manager page with full CRUD form. InstantQuoteEstimator component is correctly integrated but only renders when product has valid base_cost.

integration_issues.issue: Component correctly integrated but only renders when baseCost > 0. Test product (69d967d601e661b10590308f) has base_price but not base_cost/partner_cost, so estimator doesn't show. This is expected behavior per component design.

critical_code_review_comments: quote_estimation_routes.py: POST /api/quote-estimate correctly returns customer-safe output only (no margin%, distributable pool, allocations exposed)
quote_estimation_routes.py: POST /api/quote-estimate/range correctly calculates price range with tier-based margins
promotions_service.py: apply_promotion_to_order() correctly blocks referral_priority promos when has_referral=true (line 117-118)
InstantQuoteEstimator.jsx: Component correctly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
AdminSettingsHubPage.jsx: MarginSimulator uses 400ms debounce for live calculation via /api/commission-engine/calculate-order
AdminPromotionsPage.jsx: Full CRUD form with all 4 stacking rules (no_stack, stack_with_cap, reduce_when_affiliate, referral_priority)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing LAUNCH2026 and HOLIDAY5K promotions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quote Estimation API fully tested. POST /api/quote-estimate returns customer-safe pricing (unit_price ~67500 for base_cost=50000 with 35% margin). LAUNCH2026 promo applies 2% discount. POST /api/quote-estimate/range returns price range. Margin Simulator in Settings Hub -> Pricing Policy tab works with live debounce. Promotions Manager at /admin/promotions-manager has full CRUD. InstantQuoteEstimator component integrated in AccountProductDetailPage but only renders when product has base_cost > 0.

backend_apis.POST /api/quote-estimate (basic): Returns estimated_unit_price=67500, estimated_total=202500 for base_cost=50000 qty=3
backend_apis.POST /api/quote-estimate (customer-safe): Does NOT expose margin_pct, distributable_pool, allocations, tier info
backend_apis.POST /api/quote-estimate/range: Returns price_range_low=54000, price_range_high=108000 for min=40000 max=80000
backend_apis.POST /api/promotions/apply (valid): Returns customer-safe output with discount_amount and message
backend_apis.POST /api/promotions/apply (referral_pri: Returns valid=false, blocked by referral priority
backend_apis.POST /api/commission-engine/calculate-or: Returns totals with base_cost, selling_price, margin breakdown
backend_apis.GET /api/commission-engine/pricing-polic: Returns tiers with margin percentages and distribution splits

frontend_ui.Settings Hub Pricing Policy tab: Loads with Margin & Distribution Tiers, Pricing Preview, Policy Rules, Margin Simulator sections
frontend_ui.Margin Simulator inputs: Order value, items, wallet, affiliate/referral/sales toggles all functional
frontend_ui.Margin Simulator results: Shows vendor base cost, selling price, total margin, protected margin, distributable pool, allocations
frontend_ui.Margin Simulator referral override: When referral toggled on, affiliate commission disabled (referral overrides)
frontend_ui.Promotions Manager page: Loads at /admin/promotions-manager with stats, table, filters, search
frontend_ui.Promotions table: Shows HOLIDAY5K (TZS 5,000, Referral Priority) and LAUNCH2026 (2%, No Stacking)
frontend_ui.New Promotion form: All fields present: name, code, description, scope, discount type/value, stacking rules, dates, limits, message
frontend_ui.Stacking rules in form: All 4 options visible: No Stacking, Stack with Cap, Reduce with Affiliate, Referral Priority
